collaborations.title: Cross-modal Data Processing and Machine Learning Model Training
collaborations.intro: Pathological diagnosis requires the integration of cross-modal information such as slice images, clinical texts, and genetic data. However, traditional AI struggles to efficiently integrate this information, which limits the accuracy of diagnosis. The laboratory and the Bingli Team of Anbiping Group have jointly developed and applied for the patent of "Cross-Modal Data Processing and Model Training Technology".
collaborations.description:
Pathological diagnosis requires the integration of cross-modal information such as slice images, clinical texts, and genetic data. However, traditional AI struggles to efficiently integrate this information, which limits the accuracy of diagnosis. The laboratory and the Bingli Team of Anbiping Group have jointly developed and applied for the patent of "Cross-Modal Data Processing and Model Training Technology".This invention patent technology can: 
· Improve AI diagnosis accuracy: It solves the problem of cross-modal "misaligned learning" and increases the recognition accuracy of complex cases by more than 20%.
· Reduce costs: It reduces reliance on manual annotation by 30% to 50% and accelerates the implementation of models.
· Support multi-scenario applications: It covers slice screening, report generation, and prognosis prediction, and helps improve primary-level diagnosis.
Anbiping provides scenario support, while the technical team delivers patented technology based on open-source data. The two parties work together to promote the industrialization of cross-modal AI in the pathological field and provide an "algorithm + data + scenario" solution for precision medicine.
